title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Mink Fluffy Blanket, Soft & Cosy Thermal Throw For Sofas, Cuddle Warm Throws For Beds, Silver, Fur Throw ( 150 x 200 cm )
features: SUMPTUOUSLY SOFT SETTEE THROW: This beautiful blanket for your bed or settee is expertly crafted to be highly durable as well as fabulously soft against your skin.
WARM AND COSY FAUX FUR THROW: Ultra-light and breathable, this stunning micromink fur throw is the ideal companion for cold winter nights.
EXQUISITELY CRAFTED BEDSPREAD: The greatest of care and high-quality material are used in the manufacture of this snuggly fleece blanket, ideal for winter.
EASY CARE DECOR UPDATE: This fabulous easy care home accessory is the update to your furnishings you have been looking for.
CHOICE OF ELEGANT SHADES: Customise your décor with a wide range of stunning colours options to enhance your living space.
